name: Intelligence-Guided Adaptive Purification for DDoS-Resilient Quantum Networks: A CUDA-Q based Study
summary: arXiv:2607.16276v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum-repeater networks require adaptive control policies that balance entanglement generation rate, end-to-end fidelity, purification overhead,...
description: arXiv:2607.16276v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum-repeater networks require adaptive control policies that balance entanglement generation rate, end-to-end fidelity, purification overhead, and memory-induced latency. This tradeoff becomes more complex when the classical control plane is degraded by cyber anomalies or denial-of-service traffic. We develop a CUDA-Q/SeQUeNCe co-simulation...
author: Santanu Ganguly
